settings.heading: We Make Shirts That Make People Smile
settings.lead: FunShirts.us started with a simple idea: life's too short for boring clothes. We design tees and accessories that spark joy, start conversations, and feel incredible to wear.
settings.story_text_1: It all started when we couldn't find a t-shirt brand that nailed both quality and personality. Everything was either cheap fabric with a funny print, or premium quality with zero personality. We thought: why not both?
settings.story_text_2: Today, every FunShirts design is printed on 100% ring-spun cotton using eco-friendly water-based inks. We obsess over the details so you don't have to - from the weight of the fabric to the softness of the collar. The result? Tees that get softer with every wash and prints that never crack or fade.
settings.cta_text: Join thousands of happy customers wearing the comfiest, funniest shirts on the planet.

settings.title: Quality Over Everything
settings.description: 100% ring-spun cotton, eco-friendly inks, and prints that never crack or fade.

settings.title: Designed to Make You Smile
settings.description: Every design is made to spark joy and start conversations wherever you go.

settings.title: Kind to the Planet
settings.description: Water-based inks, ethically sourced cotton, and minimal-waste packaging.

settings.title: Made for Everyone
settings.description: Inclusive sizing and designs that bring people together, not apart.
